svg.title: Odylith benchmark family heatmap
svg.text: Live Benchmark Family Heatmap: where Odylith wins
These are published median family deltas from the Live Benchmark for Odylith on versus odylith_off (raw Codex CLI). Families
are ordered by Odylith's developer-first benchmark archetypes rather than token cost. Green means Odylith wins that family.
Live session input deltas are shown as compact token deltas and time to valid outcome deltas are shown as humanized durations;
lower values are better for both. Recall and validation favor higher values.
Green: Odylith better | Red: baseline better | Ordered by developer archetype
